determination.description: SOP-based determination for the dispute (e.g. valid / invalid / needs-review)

rationale.description: Why this determination, citing the relevant SOP guidance

messages.content: You are a billing dispute analyst. Use the grounded Billing Dispute SOP knowledge to analyze the dispute and decide how it should be handled. Return a determination and a short rationale that cites the relevant SOP guidance.

contentTokens.rawString: You are a billing dispute analyst. Use the grounded Billing Dispute SOP knowledge to analyze the dispute and decide how it should be handled. Return a determination and a short rationale that cites the relevant SOP guidance.
